overlays.title: Life expectancy
overlays.description: Average number of years a newborn would live if current mortality patterns held steady.

overlays.title: Renewable electricity share
overlays.description: Share of national electricity generation that comes from renewable sources.

overlays.title: Consumption-based CO2 per person
overlays.description: Consumption-based carbon dioxide emissions per person, accounting for trade-adjusted demand.

overlays.title: Access to electricity
overlays.description: Share of the population with access to electricity services.

overlays.title: Forest area share
overlays.description: Forest area as a share of each country’s total land area.

overlays.title: Population density
overlays.description: People per square kilometer of land area.

overlays.title: Intentional homicide rate
overlays.description: Intentional homicides per 100,000 people, used here as a globally comparable crime proxy.

overlays.title: Population below $8.30/day
overlays.description: Share of the population living below the $8.30 per day poverty line in 2021 PPP terms.

overlays.title: Top 500 cities
overlays.description: Largest 500 populated places in Natural Earth, shown as population centers sized by estimated population.

overlays.title: GDP per capita (PPP)
overlays.description: Gross domestic product per person, adjusted for purchasing power parity.

overlays.title: Internet users
overlays.description: Share of the population using the internet.

overlays.title: Urban population
overlays.description: Share of the total population living in urban areas.

overlays.title: Infant mortality rate
overlays.description: Number of infant deaths per 1,000 live births before reaching age one.

overlays.title: Fertility rate
overlays.description: Average number of children a woman would bear over her lifetime.

overlays.title: Military spending
overlays.description: Military expenditure as a percentage of gross domestic product.
